Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Anti-Ship, Anti-Ship Heavy, and Anti-Ship Precision loadouts are intended for use against ships, surfaced submarines, or small boats.
These loadouts normally use long-range guided anti-ship missiles as their primary armament. They can also carry dumb bombs and cluster bombs to be used against crippled (but still afloat) targets.
Anti-Ship Precision loadouts will include laser-guided bombs or TV guided bombs, similar to Strike Precision loadouts.
